content:
“Banishment or Ascension” → If they achieve 3 perfect mastery exams, they opt out of the final paper and run a class session.


✅ Why This Works:
• Gamifies engagement while keeping academic rigor.
• Encourages role-playing that mirrors literary archetypes.
• Allows agency, specialization, and dynamic course engagement.

2️⃣ XP System & Unlockables

XP is earned through:
✔ Weekly assignments (discussions, catharsis, close readings).
✔ Extra credit (creative writing, recommendations thread).
✔ Mastery exams & challenges.

🛡️ Unlockables (Tied to XP & Completion of Certain Tasks)
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 25 (chunk 25/555)
